---
title: "Exploring TROP2 expression in oropharyngeal squamous cell carcinoma: Association with prognosis and tumor immune microenvironment composition"
date: 2025-10-01
author:
  - name: Siqueira, Juliana Mota
  - name: Heguedusch, Daniele
  - name: Cunha, Mateus Trinconi
  - name: De Sousa, Luana Guimaraes
  - name: Marques-Piubelli, Mario L.
  - name: Carvalho, Giovanna Lopes
  - name: Hoff, Camilla Oliveira
  - name: Bonini, Flavia
  - name: Mitani, Yoshitsugu
  - name: Spiotto, Michael T.
  - name: Goepfert, Ryan
  - name: Nunes, Fabio Daumas
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
  - name: McGrail, Daniel J
  - name: El-Naggar, Adel K.
  - name: Ferrarotto, Renata
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Oral Oncology"
  volume: 169
  doi: "10.1016/j.oraloncology.2025.107634"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Exploring TROP2 expression in oropharyngeal squamous cell carcinoma: Association with prognosis and tumor immune microenvironment composition</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
